name: Avocado Relish
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium avocado (about 1/4 pound), peeled and finely diced
1 tbsp chopped fresh cilantro or parsley, seeded mild or hot chili pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine avocado and lime juice; set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the remaining ingredients (red onion, red bell pepper, green bell pepper, tomatoes, cilantro or parsley, garlic, olive or vegetable oil, salt, and pepper).
3. Carefully fold the mixed vegetables into the avocado mixture.
4. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to blend.
5. Just before serving, stir well.
6. This recipe serves 4 portions, approximately 1/2 cup each.
